lineage.Process: Intersect "PRED '';Id_Manzanas ''" "C:\Documents and Settings\Administrador\Escritorio\TITIRIBI\TITIRIBI URBANO 2007\ESTRUCTURA SIG\PRE1.shp" ALL # INPUT
Intersect "PRE1 '';MUNICIPIO ''" "C:\Documents and Settings\Administrador\Escritorio\TITIRIBI\TITIRIBI URBANO 2007\ESTRUCTURA SIG\TITIRIBI.mdb\PRE1" ALL # INPUT

Project "E:\TITIRIBI\PLANOS CATASTRALES URBANOS\MAPAS\PRED1.shp" "E:\TITIRIBI\PLANOS CATASTRALES URBANOS\MAPAS\PRED1_Project1.shp" GEOGCS['GCS_Bogota',DATUM['D_Bogota',SPHEROID['International_1924',6378388.0,297.0]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]] # PROJCS['Colombia_Bogota_Zone',GEOGCS['GCS_Bogota',DATUM['D_Bogota',SPHEROID['International_1924',6378388.0,297.0]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Transverse_Mercator'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',1000000.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',1000000.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',-74.08091666666667],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',1.0],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',4.599047222222222],UNIT['Meter',1.0]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

Project "E:\TITIRIBI\PLANOS CATASTRALES URBANOS\MAPAS\PRED1_Project1.shp" "E:\TITIRIBI\PLANOS CATASTRALES URBANOS\MAPAS\PRED1_Project1_Project.shp" GEOGCS['GCS_MAGNA',DATUM['D_MAGNA',SPHEROID['GRS_1980',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]] Bogota_To_MAGNA_Region_4_CF GEOGCS['GCS_Bogota',DATUM['D_Bogota',SPHEROID['International_1924',6378388.0,297.0]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

Project "E:\TITIRIBI\PLANOS CATASTRALES URBANOS\MAPAS\PRED1_Project1_Project.shp" "E:\TITIRIBI\PLANOS CATASTRALES URBANOS\MAPAS\PRED1_Project1_Project_Proje.shp" PROJCS['MAGNA_Colombia_Bogota',GEOGCS['GCS_MAGNA',DATUM['D_MAGNA',SPHEROID['GRS_1980',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Transverse_Mercator'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',1000000.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',1000000.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',-74.07750791666666],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',1.0],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',4.596200416666666],UNIT['Meter',1.0]] # GEOGCS['GCS_MAGNA',DATUM['D_MAGNA',SPHEROID['GRS_1980',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 2; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.2.0.1324

descript.abstract: REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.
descript.purpose: REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.

citeinfo.origin: REQUIRED: The name of an organization or individual that developed the data set.
citeinfo.pubdate: REQUIRED: The date when the data set is published or otherwise made available for release.
citeinfo.title: PRED1

timeperd.current: REQUIRED: The basis on which the time period of content information is determined.

sngdate.caldate: REQUIRED: The year (and optionally month, or month and day) for which the data set corresponds to the ground.

status.progress: REQUIRED: The state of the data set.
status.update: REQUIRED: The frequency with which changes and additions are made to the data set after the initial data set is completed.

bounding.westbc: REQUIRED: Western-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in longitude.
bounding.eastbc: REQUIRED: Eastern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in longitude.
bounding.northbc: REQUIRED: Northern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in latitude.
bounding.southbc: REQUIRED: Southern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in latitude.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.
theme.themekey: REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.

idinfo.accconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.
idinfo.useconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.

dataIdInfo.idPurp: Contrato Interadministrativo 05 de 2018 entre el municipio de Titiribi y Asociación de Municipios del Norte Antioqueño (AMUNORTE), para la revision y ajuste del Esquema de Ordenamiento Territorial Municipal
dataIdInfo.idAbs: Delimitacion de los bienes inmuebles o predios de la zona urbana del municipio de Titiribi, segun la actualizacion catastral.

searchKeys.keyword: Predios Suelo Urbano Municipio de Titiribi

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntper: REQUIRED: The person responsible for the metadata information.
cntorgp.cntorg: REQUIRED: The organization responsible for the metadata information.

cntaddr.addrtype: REQUIRED: The mailing and/or physical address for the organization or individual.
cntaddr.city: REQUIRED: The city of the address.
cntaddr.state: REQUIRED: The state or province of the address.
cntaddr.postal: REQUIRED: The ZIP or other postal code of the address.

cntinfo.cntvoice: REQUIRED: The telephone number by which individuals can speak to the organization or individual.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
